sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT last_run_ts AS wm FROM etl_control WHERE job_name='scd2_customer'

scripts.text: UPDATE etl_control SET last_run_ts = GETDATE() WHERE job_name='scd2_customer'

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT '@{formatDateTime(utcNow(),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')}' AS last_run_ts,
       '@{formatDateTime(concat(substring(pipeline().parameters.p_fileName,15,4),'-',substring(pipeline().parameters.p_fileName,19,2),'-',substring(pipeline().parameters.p_fileName,21,2)),'yyyy-MM-dd')}' AS last_effective_date

transformations.name: drvAction
transformations.description: Creating/updating the columns 'customer_id, customer_name, email, city, customer_tier, updated_at, rn, hash_scd2, customer_sk, customer_id, customer_name, email, city, customer_tier, hash_scd2, effective_start_date, effective_end_date, is_current, action'

scriptLines: lkpCurrent derive(dim_action = iif(isNull(dim_customer_id), 'INSERT', iif(dim_hash_scd2 != hash_scd2, 'SCD2', 'NOCHANGE'))) ~> drvAction
lkpCurrent derive(action = iif(isNull(dim_customer_id), 'INSERT', iif( dim_hash_scd2 != hash_scd2, 'SCD2','NOCHANGE'))) ~> drvAction
lkpDim derive(action = iif(isNull(dim_customer_id), 'INSERT', iif(dim_current_city != city, 'SHIFT', iif(dim_email != email, 'T1', 'NOCHANGE')))) ~> drvAction
disjoint: false) ~> splitAction@(streamInsert, streamShift, streamT1, streamNoChange)
